pages.title: Purpose
pages.text: $(l)劫$() is the breakthrough trial before a stave can upgrade.$(br2)Normal successful glyphs add brush momentum to the held stave. Winning an $(l)入$() Ink Arena adds a larger chunk. When the stave says its realm is full, write 劫 to begin tribulation.

pages.title: Arena
pages.text: 劫 creates a harsher aerial arena than 入: the center is still obsidian, the outer deepslate expands in rings, and the walls rise higher.$(br2)It reuses Ink Arena rules, but the waves are longer and elites and bosses hit harder.

pages.title: Victory
pages.text: After all waves are cleared, the current stave gains an upgrade-ready mark. You can pick up drops first, then write $(l)出$() to leave.$(br2)After leaving, use the short-stave upgrade shape to craft the next tier.

pages.title: Failure
pages.text: Failing tribulation does not destroy the stave and does not lock you out for long.$(br2)It only halves the current stave's brush momentum, rounding odd values up. Refill momentum and try again.

pages.title: Advice
pages.text: 劫 is rough enough that a body glyph setup matters: 心 for health, 忍 to split burst damage, 净 to clean ink wound, 稳 to hold position, and 怒 to strike back.$(br2)It is not a daily farming arena. It is the gate for stave growth.
